articles.title: Tactical analysis: England look exciting but how can they tighten up?

articles.title: Calvin Harris & Commonwealths force Monday start to Celtic's title defence
articles.summary: Celtic open the 2026-27 Scottish Premiership season at home to Dundee on 3 August, with the champions saying they are disappointed to be starting on a Monday evening.

articles.summary: Manchester United and Tottenham move for Crysencio Summerville, Chelsea monitor goalkeeper Diogo Costa and target Andrea Cambiaso.

articles.title: Drone brought down near South Korea training base
articles.summary: The Mexican military reportedly intercepts and brings down an unregistered drone seen flying over South Korea's training base before their Group A match with co-hosts Mexico on Friday.

articles.summary: Every match across the opening weekend of the 2026/27 Scottish Premiership season will be shown live on Sky Sports.

articles.title: Kilmarnock fixtures: St Johnstone first up followed by Celtic - both live on Sky
articles.summary: Kilmarnock will kick off their 2026/27 Scottish Premiership season at newly-promoted St Johnstone on August 2, live on Sky Sports.

articles.title: Kane heads England into 2-1 lead against Croatia
articles.summary: Harry Kane scores his second goal of the game against Croatia, heading home from a Declan Rice corner to give England a 2-1 lead.

articles.title: Real Madrid sign Silva on free after Man City exit
articles.summary: Bernado Silva, who left Manchester City at the end of the season, links up with new Real Madrid manager Jose Mourinho.

articles.title: Scottish Premiership fixture release - all you need to know
articles.summary: The fixtures for the 2026-27 Scottish Premiership season are released on Thursday at 12:00 BST - and you can see them on the BBC Sport website and app as soon as they are announced.

articles.title: Cape Verde goalkeeper set to be reunited with his mum
articles.summary: Vozinha's mum has been granted a visa to travel to the US ahead of Cape Verde's next game against Uruguay.

articles.summary: Fulham have two leading candidates in mind to take over from former manager Marco Silva, says the club's vice-chairman and director of football operations Tony Khan.

articles.title: Working with Postecoglou and following the data - Salford's new boss Cklamovski
articles.summary: Salford City have appointed Peter Cklamovski, someone with no experience of coaching in English football to try and lead them to promotion out of League Two

articles.title: Ivory Coast's Wahi denied entry to Canada
articles.summary: The Ivory Coast football federation have announced their forward Elye Wahi has been denied entry to Canada for their next World Cup game.

articles.title: Are goalkeepers struggling with the World Cup ball?
articles.summary: Joe Hart, Wayne Rooney and Mark Chapman discuss whether goalkeepers are struggling to get to grips with the World Cup ball, after a number of long range goals.

articles.title: Fayzullaev scores Uzbekistan's first-ever World Cup goal
articles.summary: Abbosbek Fayzullaev scores Uzbekistan's first-ever goal at a World Cup final, tapping in an equaliser against Colombia.

articles.title: 'If we lose, we lose in our way' - how Tuchel inspired 'fearful' England
articles.summary: England players were on the receiving end of a half-time reproach from manager Thomas Tuchel as their World Cup campaign got off to a victorious start against Croatia.

articles.title: Beaumont in squad for historic Lord's Test but no place for Dean
articles.summary: Tammy Beaumont returns for England's inaugural Lord's Test match against India this July after being left out of the T20 World Cup squad, but there is no place white-ball vice-captain Charlie Dean.

articles.title: World Cup can still make a mockery of predictions
articles.summary: Convinced football is coming home? Lumping on Germany after scoring seven? Tipping Lionel Messi to retain it? Telling yourself that Sweden are dark horses? Writing off Spain, Brazil and Cristiano Rona...

articles.title: England hit four in World Cup opener against Croatia
articles.summary: England make a winning start to their World Cup 2026 campaign, beating Croatia 4-2 in a thrilling match in Dallas.

articles.title: Substitute Rashford guides home England's fourth against Croatia
articles.summary: Substitute Marcus Rashford scores for England to seal a 4-2 win over Croatia in their opening Group L match at the 2026 Fifa World Cup.

articles.title: Musa strikes for Croatia to make it 2-2 against England
articles.summary: Petar Musa scores for Croatia to make it 2-2 against England in their World Cup match in Dallas.

articles.title: DR Congo earn World Cup point against Portugal
articles.summary: DR Congo come from behind to hold Portugal to a 1-1 draw in their Group K match at the Houston Stadium in the Fifa World Cup.
